commands: Expand the target market demographics to include consumers over 35 years old, as they may also be interested in health beverages.
Consider additional consumer segments such as families or older adults who are health-conscious, to ensure a broader appeal.
Revise the analysis of demand factors to include potential influences from lifestyle changes across various age groups, not just millennials and Gen Z.
Incorporate a competitive analysis that evaluates not only direct competitors but also indirect competitors that may appeal to different demographics.
Adjust the pricing strategy to reflect potential variations in price sensitivity among different age groups, ensuring that the strategy is inclusive of all target segments.
